entry.value:
{"currentConversationId":"9bf320bf-957d-423e-af24-8cba502d68e5","agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"cc70e298-6aaa-4f3e-858d-d03d4c7ed058":{"id":"cc70e298-6aaa-4f3e-858d-d03d4c7ed058","createdAtIso":"2025-10-29T05:26:13.251Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-29T05:26:13.251Z","chatHistory":[],"feedbackStates":{},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"mentioned_items":[],"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":false,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false},"personaType":0},"9bf320bf-957d-423e-af24-8cba502d68e5":{"id":"9bf320bf-957d-423e-af24-8cba502d68e5","name":"GitHub Action Usage Instructions Created
","createdAtIso":"2025-10-29T05:26:13.321Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-29T07:00:53.896Z","chatHistory":[{"request_id":"ab5a13af-2671-42b6-9f88-dcceacdbfe80","uuid":"9d3d0840-314b-447c-8c51-248eff002063","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1761715573322,"seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"61631f25-0f36-40ae-a5c6-0d226b900c3f","timestamp":"2025-10-29T05:28:52.910Z","request_message":"please provide usage instructions for this github action triggered from my fork and this branch. use all the engines except the graph engine","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"6366c7f7-2319-43eb-bd4e-a17089e2f6bf","timestamp":"2025-10-29T05:29:03.256Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"4c48a0c0-bfd4-4608-840c-e3dfe4041bf5","timestamp":"2025-10-29T05:29:07.455Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"53a6bbe4-636a-42dc-b2b6-46f4c0504fa0","timestamp":"2025-10-29T05:29:17.171Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"60372325-29dd-4fb4-a27a-153731ff74e5","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:51:16.825Z","request_message":"the new version of sf code-analyzer relies on a config file that needs to be passed into this action. once we have that, the actual mechanism of running the code-analyzer is to call `sf code-analyzer run -c <path to config.yml> -f results.sarif` This will generate a valid sarif file, so the code in this action to do so can be deprecated. however, the action should still filter the sarif file's findings to show only the files that were modified, and only if the violation occurs within the actual changed section of the file. any questions? ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"38bea3c6-6a11-40f3-bd74-e6c18d017de6","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:54:17.627Z","request_message":"1. add a new input param for the config file. 
2. ditch backwards compatability. you can deprecate the engine, pmd config etc. 
3. let's use a configurable output name for the sarif file. default to sfca-results.sarif
4. remove teh sarif generation code. keep the parsing / filtering logic. Update classes as needed. 
5. let the config file scan everything, then filter the sarif results. 
6. the new scanner runs flow-scanner by default, so deprecate that option, defer to config file. ","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"878cac58-2475-475b-b575-8d1f9e17d4aa","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:54:29.982Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"48f99412-4211-411e-83d9-26cb301f069b","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:54:36.118Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"c7068dba-e393-4d42-909a-b02399731a8e","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:55:03.629Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"3a6644c3-1a9f-401b-b880-6a4f00ca25e5","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:55:14.865Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"7c3354ff-7703-4ea0-93ac-bdcb3dda4056","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:55:37.104Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"dc2405f1-f23d-4ec3-900d-37b8a5e13bd2","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:56:01.506Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"62a8ed12-2860-42c5-86a7-6d68ceb002c9","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:56:16.734Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"e5f2c695-eb59-46a9-9edc-641dd1b96452","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:56:40.545Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"fa64efab-2be0-4b2d-aefa-e68c99875db4","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:56:52.063Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"0c10df6f-29d0-446c-9ffa-c0372f7bea4d","timestamp":"2025-10-29T06:57:04.841Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUu _message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"49cf30ed-ea64-4f51-8fd3-60406cb9d388","timestamp":"2025-10-29T07:00:19.729Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"2b658d59-823d-434c-96f5-1095ffa54213","timestamp":"2025-10-29T07:00:28.377Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"991ec530-3ecf-4773-a1dd-e37ac81d7732","timestamp":"2025-10-29T07:00:32.784Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"9ea40c34-3d5d-4de6-aed1-f63eebd4e83a","timestamp":"2025-10-29T07:00:44.352Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"11b2790c-9401-4a30-a2f4-df8f9ecda5bd","timestamp":"2025-10-29T07:00:49.357Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"temp-fe-8652cc7d-5b4d-461e-8c6b-f676ef49e023","timestamp":"2025-10-29T07:00:53.896Z","request_message":"","status":"sent","seen_state":"unseen"}],"feedbackStates":{"temp-fe-41f49847-ad7d-470c-be3d-d092e89d1a60":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-bc1b5933-a8f1-47eb-9a12-f12b7b92c857":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-2cb276e7-275b-430d-80d0-8d36b4bef3bf":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-3f1cb35d-84d1-4b75-ac25-f5d8b78d1bfe":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-275171a9-0783-4048-8ce3-f07688ba59b4":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-60f66ffd-a3a4-4828-b8d2-282f408309d8":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-166964fa-316d-4d47-926d-92ee5ef6d5a4":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-3d650ab7-a0dc-46a7-91aa-e0d3b66b98ba":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-2069e95c-b9d5-4b5b-8671-6db323b96a9e":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"
